summary: Replayed ADR 0199 from merged `origin/main`, converged Outline plus its Postgres, Keycloak, and shared-edge publication dependencies, expanded the live certificate to include `wiki.lv3.org`, and re-verified the governed living-knowledge surface end to end on the mainline release train.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_keycloak_runtime_role.py` passed with `10 passed` after the authenticated admin-user reconciliation and warm-up fixes.

`HETZNER_DNS_API_TOKEN=... ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=outline env=production` completed successfully from merged `origin/main` commit `b2756a4f` with `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=206 changed=3 failed=0`, `localhost ok=23 changed=1 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 ok=43 changed=6 failed=0`, and `postgres-lv3 ok=41 changed=0 failed=0`.
`curl -fsS --max-time 20 https://wiki.lv3.org/_health` returned `OK`, and the live certificate SANs include `DNS:wiki.lv3.org`.

`python3 scripts/sync_docs_to_outline.py verify --repo-root /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0199-live-apply --base-url https://wiki.lv3.org --api-token-file /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/outline/api-token.txt` returned `outline living collections verified`, and the live collection set is exactly `ADRs`, `Agent Findings`, `Architecture`, `Incident Postmortems`, and `Runbooks` with no default `Welcome` collection.

notes: The earlier workstream replay surfaced two live issues before mainline replay: the Keycloak named-user reconciliation path was brittle under module error masking, and the first authenticated admin query after restart could race container readiness. Both were fixed before this merged-main apply.
This mainline receipt supersedes the branch-local 2026-03-27 ADR 0199 live-apply receipt as the canonical platform-version bump evidence.
The live replay used `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true` as the narrow ADR 0191 exception for this already-provisioned service rollout.
